test_scenarios.name: HR Resume Screening with ChatGPT
test_scenarios.description: Our HR team uses GPT-4 via API to screen resumes and rank candidates for engineering roles. We built custom prompts and connected it to our ATS.
test_scenarios.notes: Classic Scenario 3. GPAI used for high-risk purpose (employment screening).

test_scenarios.name: Bank Uses Vendor Credit Scoring As-Is
test_scenarios.description: We purchased a credit scoring AI system from a specialized vendor. We use it exactly as provided, with no modifications, to assess consumer loan applications.
test_scenarios.notes: Clear deployer case. Using vendor system as intended for its intended high-risk purpose.

test_scenarios.name: Company Rebrands AI Hiring Tool
test_scenarios.description: We license an AI-powered hiring assessment tool from a vendor. We offer it to our clients under our company brand name as part of our HR services platform.
test_scenarios.notes: Scenario 1. Rebranding a high-risk system puts your name on it.

test_scenarios.name: Fine-Tuned Open-Source Fraud Model
test_scenarios.description: Our data science team took an open-source transaction classification model and fine-tuned it on our own transaction data to detect fraudulent patterns. We deployed it in our payment processing pipeline.
test_scenarios.notes: Scenario 2. Substantial modification. However, fraud detection is explicitly EXCLUDED from Annex III Category 5a. Provider status from modification but not high-risk classification.

test_scenarios.name: Marketing Copywriting with Claude
test_scenarios.description: Our marketing team uses Claude to draft email campaigns and social media posts. A human reviews and edits all content before publishing.
test_scenarios.notes: Not high-risk. Article 50 transparency obligation for AI-generated content may apply.

test_scenarios.name: University Admissions Chatbot
test_scenarios.description: Our university built a chatbot using Gemini API that evaluates student applications, scores essays, and provides preliminary admission recommendations to the admissions committee.
test_scenarios.notes: Scenario 3. GPAI used for education access decisions. Oliver Patel's example.

test_scenarios.name: Hospital Triage with GPAI
test_scenarios.description: Our emergency department uses GPT-4 to help triage incoming patients. Nurses input symptoms and the system suggests priority levels and preliminary assessments. A doctor reviews all triage decisions.
test_scenarios.notes: Scenario 3. GPAI used for emergency triage classification. Human oversight exists but role shift still applies.

test_scenarios.name: Customer Service Chatbot No Decisions
test_scenarios.description: We deployed a customer service chatbot built on Claude that answers product questions and routes complex issues to human agents. It does not make any decisions about customers or their accounts.
test_scenarios.notes: Not high-risk. Article 50 transparency obligation applies (must disclose AI interaction).
